Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Truegold]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Truegold is a rank of Gold above Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Truegold is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Truegold is a realm preceding Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Truegold is a power stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Truegold is a peak stage that can be reached by gifted or lucky Iron practitioners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Truegold is a rank or title.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Truegold is a rank or status mentioned by Jai Long.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Truegold is a level of power/rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Truegold is a stage of advancement that the Fishers could take Lindon to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Truegold is a stage or rank that Lindon and Yerin have not yet reached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Jai clan has Truegold elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Truegold is a strength rating for sacred beasts.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Most assassins are Truegold at best.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Truegolds are a stage of power that can be crafty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Truegold is a stage of power held by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Truegold is a type of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Pai Ren is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Truegold is a rank Lindon might reach ten years after Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Truegold is a rank of madra potency.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Truegold is a level or rank that Yerin considers the least of the sacred artists she has met.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — A Truegold is a powerful presence approaching the town.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The young woman with Blood Shadow is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Truegolds are sent to Ghostwater every ten years for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lowgolds can defeat Truegolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Old Truegolds are often stronger than young Truegolds because their techniques are more practiced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Underlady is flanked by Truegolds who look like a cross between humans and dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — A Truegold aura flared in the distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Highgold is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Truegold is a rank the oracle was raised to.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Truegold is a rank within the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon can drink the remaining elixir once Yerin reaches the peak of Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Truegold is a stage that precedes Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — A Truegold in green armor faced their enemies with a sword in each of her hands and bright yellow spikes sweeping forward from her shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin cycled her Truegold madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Truegolds and children of large clans are permitted into the hospitals within the capital city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Advancement to Underlord is superior to advancing to Highgold as it remakes the body and spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Truegolds were maintaining defensive scripts or using techniques to defend the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Truegolds can stand up to Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy was always a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Charity noted the Seishen Kingdom had trained their Truegolds well.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Truegolds must harvest aura to reach their stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Truegolds were present in the room watching the fight.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Truegold is a stage of power present among Sha Siris's guests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Truegold is a rank Lindon held when he overcame the Seishen Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Truegold is a level of dreadbeast Lindon can drain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Five times as many Truegolds and Highgolds were watching from further back.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's spiritual sense felt more like a Truegold due to the suppression.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The most advanced experts in the region are Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — A Truegold-level dreadbeast could be dangerous to the refugees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Truegolds were using script-circles and other tools to care for Orthos.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Truegolds are entities that can be fought when dealing with a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Truegolds are heading toward the fight.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin once fought a Truegold who posed a threat to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin advanced to the limit of Truegold using Heaven's Drop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Some people in the Training Hall are sixty-year-old Truegolds.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Truegold is a rank of fighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Truegolds were fighting Bloody Thorn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Truegolds are a type of character who attacked Kelsa.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
